privileged_info_summary: The improve_test_coverage task requires adding test cases to the LoanRiskCalculatorTest.java file to achieve 95% line coverage and 90% branch coverage for the LoanRiskCalculator.java class. The project is a synthetic Maven project with JUnit 5 and JaCoCo for coverage measurement, created in /home/ga/IdeaProjects/fintech-risk-engine. The LoanRiskCalculator class contains complex approval logic with multiple decision branches based on credit score, debt-to-income ratio, and loan amount. The initial test suite contains only one test method and must be extended to cover all decision paths without modifying the original logic class. Coverage targets are enforced by the verifier: 95% line coverage (0.95) and 90% branch coverage (0.90).
